activities.comment: Here we go, fingers crossed for consecutive days.  Nice to be tracking you again.  Goal is 4 per day for a week then increase.
Morning, catched full moon under 37 degrees
Bowser lake around dam loop.
4PM.  Trying to go fast again.  16:16 fastest mile which is encouraging.  No to manage the swelling.
4 AM slow walk in the rain
Repeat route from yesterday.
Walk south and past Tadmore
Week 2 starts. “5s”.
Vandalia path extension 1 mile downhill to RR track
Dam, pattys falls, boardwalk loop
Ross road north into Tipp and back
Tipp city, touched where I last stopped going north, then went north - bikepath
Englewood dam boardwalk loop.
Lunch walk.  Tipp City north out and back.
To soon to tell about recovery.  Big push at 4:30 this morning to turn this loop.  Last completion was 9/29/25.
Light rain and surprising pace with some swelling and tightness from yesterdays bump in mileage.
Back of dam loop then Aullwood garden
Back side of dam, walking through running water on trails.
Back side of dam, less water compared to yesterday.
Bike path Taylorsville dam south a handful of telephone poles south of abandoned bridge

Good walk this evening.  Still pushing my right knee to catch up to where it should be.  Averaged 15:59 per mile.  Fast enough to have a toenail edge dig in and cut an adjacent one unknowingly until I took my sock off - I’ll call it a trophy for the effort.

Fun!  What started out as the same route as yesterday to prove I have reached being able to piece together a sub 16 average.  Wow, it just unexpectedly became fun…negative splits, feeling the old form again, a huge step change for my continued healing.  Will definitely relax with an easy day tomorrow. 15:10 pace.
Dam DQ side to Martindale falls, continued loop to lower trail to return.
Next segment along great Miami.  Stopped 3 miles short of downtown
Dayton WWT plant south to Island metro park and return.

LU Lynchburg, VA - Gently rolling and many steps.  After driving and work, squeezed in some miles with a dinner stop at “the bell” for a luxe box with sweet tea before playing 8 lane Frogger to get back to the hotel side of the road.
Highview warehouse 6 loops around parking lot
